title: GitHub token compromise and codebase exfiltration

workflow_patterns.name: github_token_access_review
workflow_patterns.snippet:
on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write
  actions: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  review:
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6.0.2
      - run: gh repo clone example/private-repo

known_gaps: ca9 does not currently scan GitHub token scopes, repository access grants, or audit-log events.
Workflow scanning can catch risky token permissions and source clone commands, but token theft response still needs audit-log and identity telemetry.
